title: Tensor 4
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tensor 4''' was a world. During the [[Galactic War]], there was a large processing project which caused for thousands of confiscated [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], [[Vibrosword/Legends|vibroswords]] and other weapons to be processed into useful metallic parts.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Scavenging|Swords into Slabs}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Tensor 4 was first mentioned in the unlicensed non-canon magazine article "Jet Packs", and was later canonized by its inclusion in the video game ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan]]''.

===Non-canon content===
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Bret Hanson]] was involved in a stunt with a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] on Tensor IV.<ref name="Challenge">{{ChallengeCite|44|Jet Packs}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan]]'' {{Mo}} {{ID|Tensor 4}}
